alt: Student using a computer in the library
title: Access Academic Databases
description: The library has premium access to academic databases with scholarly and peer reviewed journals written by scholars and professionals.

alt: A student pointing to an anatomy figure
title: Health Sciences Resources
description: The library has special materials just for those studying health, anatomy, and nursing. Physical models are just one of the many resources available for you.

alt: A student at a table with a textbook and water bottle
title: The Library Has Textbooks
description: You can check out the textbooks for your class at the library.
